command:
python -u -c 
import urllib.request, ssl, os, time

output_dir = 'tasks/t0002_literature_survey_dsgc_compartmental_models/assets/paper/10.1016_j.neuron.2016.04.041/files'
os.makedirs(output_dir, exist_ok=True)
out_path = os.path.join(output_dir, 'sethu_2016_ach-gaba.pdf')

# Try the http version of the cell.com direct article PDF
urls_to_try = [
    'http://www.cell.com/article/S0896627316301556/pdf',
    'https://www.cell.com/action/showPdf?pii=S0896-6273(16)30155-6',
    'https://www.cell.com/neuron/pdfExtended/S0896-6273(16)30155-6',
]

ctx = ssl.create_default_context()
ctx.check_hostname = False
ctx.verify_mode = ssl.CERT_NONE

headers = {
    'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36',
    'Accept': 'application/pdf,*/*',
}

for url in urls_to_try:
    try:
        req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers=headers)
        with urllib.request.urlopen(req, context=ctx, timeout=30) as resp:
            data = resp.read()
            ct = resp.headers.get('Content-Type', '')
            final_url = resp.url
            print(f'Tried: {url}')
            print(f'Final URL: {final_url}')
            print(f'Content-Type: {ct}, Size: {len(data)}')
            print(f'First bytes: {data[:8]}')
            if data[:4] == b'%PDF' and len(data) > 10000:
                with open(out_path, 'wb') as f:
                    f.write(data)
                print(f'SUCCESS saved to {out_path}')
                break
        time.sleep(1)
    except Exception as e:
        print(f'Error {url}: {e}')
